name: @senad-d/branchme
description: Minimal Pi extension for current-repository git branch, push, and pull request workflows.
author: Senad Dizdarević <112484166+senad-d@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run check
scripts.check: node --check scripts/check-format.mjs && node --check scripts/check-package-contents.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-npm.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-pi-installed-package.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-pi-runtime.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run smoke:pi && npm run check && npm run check:pack
scripts.release:check: npm run validate && npm run smoke:pi:packed
